name: Baked "French Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Peel potatoes and cut into slices that are 4 inches long and 1/4 inch wide.
3. Place the slices in a bowl of cold water to crisp them up.
4. Just before cooking, turn the potato slices onto paper towels and pat dry.
5. Spread the potato pieces in one layer on a shallow baking pan.
6. Sprinkle with vegetable oil.
7. Shake the pan to spread the oil evenly over the potatoes.
8. Bake for 30-40 minutes, turning the slices frequently until they are golden brown.
9. Remove the potatoes from the oven and empty them onto paper towels.
10. Sprinkle with salt and paprika.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 15g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 3g; CAL: 93;
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Use a seasoned salt substitute, if allowed by your doctor.
